description: Eval set for tuning the code-review-distill SKILL.md description trigger. Each case is a user prompt with a label: should_fire (the skill should activate) or not. Extend with real prompts you observe.

cases.prompt: Review this branch against main
cases.label: should_fire

cases.prompt: Can you review the diff before I open a PR?
cases.label: should_fire

cases.prompt: Do a code review of these changes
cases.label: should_fire

cases.prompt: What's the blast radius of this change?
cases.label: should_fire

cases.prompt: Which callers are affected if I change this exported function?
cases.label: should_fire

cases.prompt: Review the pull request
cases.label: should_fire

cases.prompt: Look over my staged changes for bugs
cases.label: should_fire

cases.prompt: Summarize what changed in this feature branch and flag risky parts
cases.label: should_fire

cases.prompt: Are there any issues in the diff between develop and HEAD?
cases.label: should_fire

cases.prompt: Audit the modified files in this PR for problems
cases.label: should_fire

cases.prompt: Write a function that reverses a linked list
cases.label: should_not_fire

cases.prompt: Explain how async/await works in JavaScript
cases.label: should_not_fire

cases.prompt: Set up a new Express server with a health endpoint
cases.label: should_not_fire

cases.prompt: Fix the failing unit test in cart.test.ts
cases.label: should_not_fire

cases.prompt: What's the capital of France?
cases.label: should_not_fire

cases.prompt: Rename the variable foo to bar everywhere
cases.label: should_not_fire

cases.prompt: Add a dark mode toggle to the settings page
cases.label: should_not_fire

cases.prompt: Install the dependencies and run the build
cases.label: should_not_fire

cases.prompt: Generate a SQL migration for a new users table
cases.label: should_not_fire

cases.prompt: Draft release notes for version 2.0
cases.label: should_not_fire
